ITSM_Tool_Name: Name of the AI-integrated ITSM tool being used for digital health device tracking.
Functionality: Details about the specific application or function of the tool, in this case, tracking and monitoring of digital health devices.
Healthcare_Provider_Name: Name of the healthcare provider that reported successful outcomes with the AI-integrated ITSM tool.
Outcome: Outcome reported by the healthcare provider after integrating the AI ITSM tool, such as reduced complaints.
Report_Date: Date when the outcome report was published.
